beats.action: Ash drifts through skeletal ironwood. Kaelen stands near a jagged outcrop, his eyes scanning the horizon.
beats.camera: Wide shot, slow pan across the landscape ending on Kaelen's profile.

beats.action: Renna emerges from the haze, pulling down her dirt-smudged respirator.
beats.camera: Medium shot, tracking Renna as she walks into frame.

beats.action: Renna coughs once, then drops a heavy metal scroll-case at Kaelen's feet.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Renna, focusing on her face and the scroll-case hitting the ground.

dialogue.text: You wanted whispers, Architect. I brought you a deafening roar.

beats.action: Kaelen looks calmly at Renna, then down at the scroll-case.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, slight low angle.

dialogue.text: Quantify the findings, Renna. I require scale, not metaphor.

beats.action: Renna crouches, kicking dust away to reveal a crudely scratched map in the ash. Her fingers trace three distinct trade routes.
beats.camera: Close-up on Renna's hands tracing the map in the ash, then pull back slightly to include her face.

beats.action: Renna's fingers trace jagged, burnt-out crosses on the map in the ash.
beats.camera: Extreme close-up on the map in the ash and Renna's tracing fingers.

dialogue.text: The border camps? Gone. The scrap-merchants? Slaughtered or conscripted. It's not a rival gang expanding territory. It's a tide.

beats.action: Kaelen stands unmoved, his gaze fixed on Renna.

dialogue.text: An organized sect. Identify their core leadership and tactical doctrine.

beats.action: Renna looks up at Kaelen, her eyes wide with a mix of fear and defiance.

dialogue.text: They don't negotiate, Kaelen. They march under a single standard, killing anyone who doesn't kneel within ten heartbeats. My best scout barely made it back to the low-depths before his lungs turned to glass. They are moving fast. Faster than you can plan for.

beats.action: Kaelen looks down at the scratched map in the ash, his analytical mind processing the coordinates of destruction.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's eyes, then slowly tilt down to the map.

beats.action: Kaelen slowly raises his head, his gaze now distant.
beats.camera: Medium close-up, slow push in on Kaelen's face.

dialogue.text: The local traditionalists and their petty squabbles are irrelevant now. We are no longer managing a local equilibrium.

beats.action: Renna looks at Kaelen, her expression grim.

dialogue.text: We're rats in a collapsing cellar, Kaelen. If that sect reaches the ridge, our little alliance won't even be a speed bump to them.

beats.action: Kaelen raises his gaze to the dark, soot-choked mountains in the distance, his eyes reflecting distant stars.

expression.kaelen_scarred_architect: Grave, resolute, burdened by new understanding

beats.camera: Wide shot, focusing on Kaelen looking towards the mountains, slight pull back to emphasize his isolation against the vast threat.
